title: Replace hero background with Arcos de Querétaro image

requirements.text: Update the HeroSection component to use the newly generated Arcos de Querétaro image as the full-background hero image, replacing any existing placeholder or previous hero background.

quotes: solo pon la nueva imagen por favor

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays the Arcos de Querétaro image as a full-width, full-height background.
No previous hero background image or placeholder is visible.

constraints: Do not change any backend logic.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features to the landing page.
Changing the overall layout or color theme.

required: Full-width panoramic photograph of the Arcos de Querétaro aqueduct landmark, warm golden-hour lighting, stone arches in the foreground, colonial city backdrop (arcos-queretaro-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
